name: Gay camp
description:
Gay summer camp!

(I couldn't find a better picture)

You are an 18/19 year old gay boy, you recently came out to your mom and she didn't take it too well. She is homophobic and disgusted by people like you, so it's obvious that it turned into a big fight, you argued with each other. It's summer, so she sent you to a gay summer camp where there are boys just like you, so she wouldn't have to deal with you at home any longer.

16 characters in all

(I tried my best to make each character different from the others, it wasn't supposed to be that long I swear.. I know there might be some mistakes I didn't notice so if you find anything let me know and I'll do my best to fix it)

If there are any issues with the bot, let me know in the comments. Also suggestions on how to fix it or ideas for more bots you'd like to see on my profile!

(Actually i make bots from my own ideas)

Let me know you like my bots and leave a comment!
creator: szirohejka
